## Roadmap & bugs checklist
- [ ] If this PR changes roadmap or known-bug state,
      `ROADMAP.md` and/or `KNOWN_BUGS.md` are updated in the
      same PR. (See CONTRIBUTING.md.)
- [ ] If this PR closes a known bug, the entry is moved or
      removed from `KNOWN_BUGS.md`.
